channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Grafiti on gable end of house, 18th May
item.description:
On the gable end of 66 Belvedere Road, there is a white spray paint tag on an unpainted brick wall. Tag depicts ZOLA (maybe?) 2020

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66b, Belvedere Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall down public alley way, 18th May
item.description:
On the north west side of alley way between Fox Hill Playing and Belvedere Road, there is a tag of black spray paint on concrete. Tag depicts BRACEN 26 Theres annother bit of blue paint to the right too. It would be nice if this spray was pressure-washed off.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Belvedere Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing street bin, 18th May
item.description:
The street bin has been missing since Friday 15th May 2026, AM. Public are using the space as a dustbin and allowing their rubbish to go straight on the floor! Please replace asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Collingwood Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Slightly damaged road sign, 18th May
item.description:
"Belvedere Road" road sign outside 52 Belvedere Road is slightly damaged with black marks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Belvedere Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is a fly tip at the top of Kentmere Rd plumstead, 18th May
item.description:
There is a fly tip at the top of Kentmere Rd plumstead
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kentmere Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signs may be turned the wrong direction, 18th May
item.description:
The "zone ends" signs here on the junction of Pleydell Avenue with Anerley Hill are twisted and so are legible from two different directions, yet only Pleydell Avenue has parking permits and bays - I think So I think these signs are pointing the wrong way, in one direction?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Pleydell Avenue, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in gutter of the road, 18th May
item.description:
Dirty nappy and other litter and rubbish in the gutter by the curb on basingdon way, please clear, thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodfarrs, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is a fly tip near number 15 Abery St plumstead, 18th May
item.description:
There is a fly tip near number 15 Abery St plumstead
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead High Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Washing machine dumped on pavement, 18th May
item.description:
Washing machine has been dumped on pavement by the household removal company for number 26 Paroma Road, Belvedere.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Paroma Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bollard, 18th May
item.description:
On the bollard to the right-hand side entrance to Grosvenor Court, there is peach coloured spray paint on the black bollard here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree at the end of Stapley road, Belvedere, overgrown and blocking light from lamppost, 18th May
item.description:
Tree at the end of Stapley road is overgrown and blocking light from lamppost Resident advised tree is overgrown and blocks the light from lamppost, making the street very dark.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Stapley Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grafiti on lampost, 18th May
item.description:
Graffiti on lampost outside 14 Anerley Hill Of white pen on green painted metal surface

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entire Stapley street Belvedere covered in litter/Rubbish, 18th May
item.description:
Entire Stapley street Belvedere covered in litter Resident advised that the entire street is dirty an full of litter and rubbish- she said it hasn't been cleaned in ages.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Stapley Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: NOS bottles dumped up alleyway, 18th May
item.description:
Over 20 large bottles of nitrous oxide were dumped up the alleyway. They’re too heavy to collect in a Litterpick so am asking for help for their removal.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gladeswood Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on street cabinet, 18th May
item.description:
On street cabinet, opposite Grosvenor Court, on Anerley Hill, there's a white spray tag (depicting DSEP)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small pot hole, 18th May
item.description:
Opposite junction of Crystal Palace Station Road, with Anerley Hill/Road, at pin location, found on the zig zag lines. There is a pot hole of about 30cm by 50cm, and 4cm deep.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brilliant, 18th May
item.description:
Can Lime and Hackney council please do something about this unacceptable abuse of our street. It is constant and annoying and ruins this for all the residents, residential and commercial. Get it sorted or get off Charlotte Rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54-56, Great Eastern Street, Shoreditch, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain cover making loud noise o/s Somerfield lodge The greens, 18th May
item.description:
Drain cover making loud noise o/s Somerfield lodge The greens Sidcup Resident advised that the drain has been clanking every time a car goes over it- she advised reported it 6 weeks ago but nothing has been done
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Green, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bin, 18th May
item.description:
Outside 42 Anerley Hill, the street bin has a bit of pen graffiti - white pen on black plastic, depicting CLOXZ

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ford Kuga GV09 UKB abandoned in private car park blocking bays, 18th May
item.description:
This vehicle has been left in the private parking area for around 5 days with the windows left open. It appears abandoned and is obstructing/affecting use of parking bays for residents.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cecilia Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
